channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 21st May
item.description:
ENWD with Standard TM with fway closure please remove fallen tree debris by bus stop (Debris/Obstruction in CW)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 21st May
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 21st May
item.description:
28day with 2 way traffic lights lift and replace broken sunken kerb above gully 900x100x45mm STATS (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 21st May
item.description:
28day with 2 way traffic lights lift and reset sunken gully STATS (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)

item.title: Pothole in centre of Bath Road opposite junction with St Phillips Street, 21st May
item.description:
Pothole in centre of Bath Road opposite junction with St Phillips Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Flats 1-6, Saint Phillip's Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Noisy manhole covers, 21st May
item.description:
Very noisy manhole covers outside 25 gloucester st, gl54 5lx. This has gone on for months now with 2 previous 'fixes' by you which have been completely ineffective. Within 2 hours the problem returns. In fact louder now than ever. Please fix my street, like you promise. To bodge the fix is a false economy. We pay for this service, please make our neighbourhood better. thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Street, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 21st May
item.description:
Please pass to relevant ahr covering this area. Please raise PERM repair for leaning loose post on verge make safe raised 21.05.26
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 21st May
item.description:
ENWD with Standard TM please remove leaning loose post in verge (Damaged Sign Post)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree blocking view, 21st May
item.description:
I refer to the FixMyStreet ref: 8837238 (between 31 Orchard Avenue and Orchard Court) which you have closed but nothing has happened. Please re-open and let me know the course of action. Tree basal branches are blocking the view (caused at least 2 near misses collisions) and the top branches are touching and moving the overhead wires. I pointed this also to the kerb mowing contractor who took a picture and reported. This issue is now at least 6 months old.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40;42, Orchard Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 21st May
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet
